comment: Hand-curated changelog of meaningful data updates. Newest first. Each entry: date (ISO yyyy-mm-dd, treated as the SHIPPED date — when it became live to users, not when it was authored), kind (one of: launch | vertical | data | engine | feature), title (short), description (1-2 sentences), verticalSlug (optional). The /pulse page reads this file at build/request time. Add new entries to the top when defaults change in a way that matters to founders.

entries.title: 30-day default-value audit, five updates landed
entries.description: Cross-checked every priced default against current market sources. Most held. The five that drifted got bumped: TikTok Shop combined fee dropped to 6% (from 9%) after the platform restructured to a flat referral, digital-products marketplace fee raised to 10% (Gumroad/Etsy/Shopify blended), cleaning insurance corrected to $60/mo (the prior $180 only made sense bundled with commercial auto), slime materials trimmed to $2.75/unit (current bulk PVA pricing), and realtor commission updated to 5.7% (post-NAR-settlement drift).

entries.title: Power Washing vertical shipped
entries.description: Mobile exterior cleaning model: jobs-per-week pricing, travel-time-aware crew costs, chemical costs per job, and a separate equipment-payment line so the rig cap-ex isn't hidden inside the vehicle row. 15 inputs, tuned to a first-year solo operator.

entries.title: Live time-since-update counter on /pulse
entries.description: The Data Pulse page now leads with an animated days/hours/minutes counter showing exactly how long since the last meaningful update. It eases up from zero on page load and refreshes silently while you read, a quiet visual proof that the calculator isn't a static spreadsheet.

entries.title: State-aware defaults for house flipping
entries.description: The house-flipping calculator now pre-fills property tax, insurance, realtor commission, median home value, and typical holding time based on the state you select. Tax burden alone swings 7x between Hawaii and New Jersey, so flipping economics that pretend otherwise are misleading. Seeded with 50-state data from Tax Foundation, Insurance Information Institute, NAR, and Zillow.

entries.title: First default-value recalibration
entries.description: Updated commodity-driven defaults to better reflect 2026 reality: candle materials, hand-pour labor minutes, slime ad spend, house-flipping holding costs, and cleaning supplies all bumped. Sourced from a critical audit of national operator ranges; flagged because the previous defaults trended low across the board.

entries.title: Slime Brand vertical shipped
entries.description: Added the slime-brand model engine with TikTok Shop fees, temperature-pack costs, and drop-based selling cadence. 18 inputs, channel-aware split across TikTok Shop, Etsy, and own-site.

entries.title: Direct-sales channel for handmade brands
entries.description: The handmade-craft model can now split revenue across Etsy, TikTok Shop, AND your own site. The own-site channel uses standard card-processing (2.9%) baked in, so founders don't forget that cost.

entries.title: Help-text tooltips on every input
entries.description: Every slider across all 10 verticals now has industry context attached. Hover the ? icon to see what the input means and what realistic ranges look like for that business.

entries.title: House Flipping vertical shipped
entries.description: Added the house-flipping model engine: ARV, rehab cost, hard-money rates, holding costs, agent commissions, the works.

entries.title: Cleaning Service vertical shipped
entries.description: Recurring-revenue cleaning service model: per-clean pricing, route density, subcontractor labor split, insurance + supplies, and customer churn.

entries.title: Multi-lever Goal Seek
entries.description: The Goal Seek panel now solves across multiple sliders at once. Pick up to 3 levers in priority order; it tries each in turn until your target lands.

entries.title: TikTok Shop fee refresh
entries.description: Updated TikTok Shop transaction-fee defaults to reflect the platform's revised structure. Affects slime, handmade-craft, candle, and reseller verticals.

entries.title: StartupLenz v1 launched
entries.description: First 7 verticals, channel-aware revenue math, growth trajectory model, written-take insight engine. The kitchen-table spreadsheet officially became a tool.
